description: A scan of an official U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services memorandum dated September 20, 2025, headed with the DHS and USCIS letterhead and seal. It is addressed to associate directors and program office chiefs from the USCIS Director, subject line 'Proclamation, Restriction on Entry of Certain Nonimmigrant Workers, H-1B'. The body describes a proclamation restricting H-1B entry except where petitions include a 100,000 dollar payment, notes it applies prospectively, and carries a digital signature and a 'FOUO, For Official Use Only' footer.
notable_text: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; Memorandum; Proclamation, Restriction on Entry of Certain Nonimmigrant Workers, H-1B; September 20, 2025; FOUO, For Official Use Only
